description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a striking custom finish featuring a playing card and poker chip motif in red, white, and black. The slide is predominantly black with a rectangular metallic accent and the model designation 'P250' engraved on the side. Both sides of the frame are adorned with a fan of red diamond playing cards and scattered poker chips, creating a bold, casino-inspired aesthetic. The grip is contoured and decorated with the same card and chip graphics, providing both visual interest and ergonomic shaping. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth finish and no visible undercuts or texturing. The magazine base is flat and silver, contrasting with the darker body and decorated grip.
description: A semi-automatic handgun with a casino-themed design, featuring red diamond playing cards and poker chips on a black and white frame. The slide is marked 'P250' and the grip is contoured with decorative graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the flat, silver magazine base; minimal detail visible on the slide or grip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'P250' marking, a fan of red diamond playing cards, and poker chips across the slide and grip.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the slide and grip, with the card and chip graphics partially visible along the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the mirrored playing card and poker chip motif, with the slide and grip contours clearly visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a gentle palm swell and a smooth, rounded backstrap. Its surface is visually dominated by a graphic of red diamond playing cards and poker chips, with no visible checkering or stippling for texture. The lower portion of the grip is black, transitioning to white and red graphics, and the base is capped with a flat, silver magazine floorplate. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or additional embellishments beyond the casino-themed artwork.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, untextured finish with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any integrated accessories or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, blending seamlessly with the frame.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and standard in profile, with a circular muzzle opening visible from the front. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the exterior finish is consistent with the rest of the handgun, appearing metallic and smooth.
attribute_slide_markings: The left side of the slide features a prominent 'P250' marking in a metallic, engraved style set within a rectangular accent. The rest of the slide is decorated with a pattern of red and white diamonds, complementing the casino theme. No other manufacturer logos, serial numbers, or caliber designations are visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and silver, with a slightly beveled edge that sits flush with the bottom of the grip. It lacks finger rests, logos, or additional texturing, providing a clean and simple termination to the grip.
